headline: intro
narration: 10 May. New king of the agents.

headline: Hermes Agent takes #1 on OpenRouter Global Ranking
narration: Hermes Agent just took number one on OpenRouter's global ranking — 271 billion tokens. OpenClaw held that crown yesterday. Claude Code sits at number four, 3.4x behind.

headline: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b down 21 ranks on OpenRouter
narration: OpenAI's open-source flagship dropped 21 ranks on OpenRouter this week. Now 36th. Free isn't enough when the competition ships daily.

headline: Tencent Hy3 preview climbs 28 ranks (38 → 10)
narration: Tencent's Hy3 jumped 28 ranks — from 38th to 10th. At six cents per million tokens, it's a fraction of the price of everything above it.

headline: Kimi K2.6 holds #1 by developer spend
narration: Kimi K2.6 holds number one by developer spend. Seventy-five cents per million tokens. Developers voting with their wallets.

headline: outro
narration: That's the briefing. Every number links to its source. gawk dot dev.
